name: sentinel-agentos-plugin
description: Sentinel AgentOS - OpenClaw plugin: deterministic Guard + layered Memory + auto Evaluation

scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{var fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'),h=process.env.USERPROFILE||process.env.HOME,pl=p.join(h,'.openclaw','plugins','sentinel-agentos');if(!fs.existsSync(pl)){fs.mkdirSync(p.join(h,'.openclaw','plugins'),{recursive:true});fs.symlinkSync(process.cwd(),pl,'junction');}}catch(e){console.warn('[sentinel] 符号链接创建失败:',e.message)}"
